title: Roof Replacement
summary: Architectural shingles, metal roofing, and flat roof systems built for coastal wind uplift.

title: Roof Repair & Leak Stop
summary: Fast diagnosis, emergency tarping, flashing fixes, and vent reseals to halt water intrusion.

title: Gutters & Drainage
summary: Seamless gutters, guards, downspout reroutes, and grade adjustments to protect foundations.

title: Siding & Exterior Trim
summary: Fiber cement, vinyl, and engineered wood siding with moisture barriers and clean detailing.

title: Decks, Porches & Railings
summary: Composite or wood builds, code-compliant railings, and coastal-rated fasteners.

title: Partner Services
summary: Landscaping, tree removal, hauling, and cleanup through vetted partners managed by us.
